name: plugin.anthropic-provider.oauthAccess
description: OAuth access token (managed by login flow)

name: plugin.anthropic-provider.oauthRefresh
description: OAuth refresh token (managed by login flow)

name: plugin.anthropic-provider.oauthExpires
description: OAuth token expiry timestamp (managed by login flow)

name: plugin.anthropic-provider.hideThinking
description: Hide thinking messages from chat (default: false)

name: plugin.anthropic-provider.hideIntermediateSteps
description: Hide intermediate tool calls, show only final answer (default: false)
